title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 137.960 - False statements to assessors — penalty
text:
137.960.  False statements to assessors — penalty. — If any person shall willfully deliver any statement to the officer charged with assessment of property for tax purposes in his county containing a false statement of a material fact, whether it be an owner, shipper, his agent, or a storageman or warehouseman of his agent, he shall be guilty of a class C misdemeanor.
(L. 1982 S.B. 476 § 8)
